Home Now Garden Uses Media

Digital Garden

A space for thoughts in varying stages of growth. Unlike static articles, these are updated periodically as my perspective evolves.

🌱 Seedling

Fresh, unpolished thoughts, raw notes, or logs.

🌿 Budding

Refining structural notes, connecting external references.

🌳 Evergreen

Highly refined concepts, synthesized summaries, and final thoughts.

  • The Digital Garden Philosophy: Files over Databases

    🌳 evergreen

    Why maintaining thoughts in a local, flat-file Markdown system is superior to database-backed blogs.

    Planted Jul 9, 2026

© 2026 — Built statically with Astro & Tailwind
